payload.answer: Treat this as a duplicate delivery of the same Slack event; do not create additional memory cards.

entity_resolution.reason: Input indicates the same Slack event ID was delivered twice; this is a retry/duplicate rather than new information.

details: Fixture indicates duplicate delivery for the same event ID (slack_retry_event_001__context).

repair_options: If later events show new content (different message text/timestamp), create memory from the new details rather than this retry.
